text.title: Subscription Models Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Recurring revenue intent AND billing platform supports dunning AND monthly cadence?

branch.when: recurring_intent == true AND platform_dunning_capable == true AND monthly_cadence == true
